rationale: Educ. Code §31.103 governs instructional material requisitions by school districts. It contains no reference to property tax, homestead exemptions, or appraised value limits. No conflict with the proposed Tax Code §11.13(b) change.
quote: A school district or open-enrollment charter school shall make a requisition for instructional material using the online requisition program maintained by the commissioner.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase; no conflict identified.
